programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes

programme.desc: When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble
programme.desc: It's the first day of third grade and Arthur's biggest fear has come true--his new teacher is the dreaded Mr. Ratburn. Then, it’s time for the all-school spellathon. Arthur is chosen to compete, and he finds facing Prunella and The Brain!

programme.title: Arthur: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins are having their first sleepover! Will the Tibbles lock James in the dark basement? Then, a cupcake's been stolen! The primary suspect: Tommy Tibble. D.W. gathers a jury and demands that justice be served.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the First World War the RAF had bombers that could fly to Berlin and back. For the first time in a thousand years British civilians found themselves under direct attack - by Zeppelin airships and Gotha bombers.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The RAF’s maritime role is often overlooked. Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far flung corners of the Empire.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49. As well as flying round-the-clock operations into the airport, Sunderland flying boats delivered supplies by landing on Lake Havel near the city.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: In this programme we bring the RAF story into the modern era. Another aircraft to have extended the RAF’s capabilities is the C130 Hercules. This aircraft has proved its capabilities in countless environments from resupply, to dropping paratroopers.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Invasion of Panama
programme.desc: Invasion of Panama: In 1989, 20,000 US troops entered Panama to overthrow military dictator Manuel Noriega and around 500 civilians were killed. What prompted the invasion?

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B17: The mighty Flying Fortress takes to the air as we examine the background and development of one of WWII's most iconic bombers.

programme.title: Hitler's Coup

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: P47: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Jessie, James, and Meowth take time to lick their wounds and dream of stealing Pikachu for the glory of Team Rocket. After a chance meeting with a Team Rocket scout, it seems these dreams are blasting off before their eyes!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a young girl watching over a group of Xatu, whose psychic powers let them predict the future of a local village. When the villagers begin doubting their warnings, can the Xatu prove the truth of their visions?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Things look bad for our heroes, who have been captured by Team Rocket at the Lake of Rage. With the fate of the world's Pokémon at stake, can Ash rise to the occasion and save the day?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a sitting and standing game. They watch some children who are sitting and standing too. Po is riding on her scooter. She hasn’t gone very far when she finds Dipsy’s hat.

programme.desc: Dipsy has no time for Tubby Custard, before watching a little girl help feed her baby sister. Po makes some Tubby Custard for Dipsy, but every time she comes to the table, she forgets and eats it all herself.

programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children watch some badgers. In Teletubbyland, Dipsy sat down to watch. He watched the windmill turning, the rabbits playing, and the trees in the wind.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love dancing. They watch a group of children perform the Boom Boom Dance, to some drum music.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Eaten By Lions
programme.desc: A hilarious and heart-warming story of half brothers Omar and Pete, who embark on a journey from Bradford to Blackpool to find Omar's real Dad.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic Part 3
programme.desc: More than a million dollars is up for grabs at Commerce in the WPT LA Poker Classic.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: Alfred Hitchcock mixes suspense, comedy, witty dialog, and endearing character in this charming, classic mystery. When a kindly governess vanishes from a train, no one believes she even exists…except for one woman who sets about solving the mystery.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Having the winning lottery jackpot ticket is the best thing that could have happened to delivery man Bill Regan. Determined to find out what happened, a friend retraces Bill's delivery stops and discovers they lead to her own husband.

programme.title: Vows of Deception
programme.desc: When a prominent lawyer is found murdered, his wife is promptly arrested and charged with the crime. She swiftly accuses her stepson, with whom she claims to be having an affair.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Sterling Brooks, a self-absorbed stock broker, is killed in a freak golfing accident. In order to secure a heavenly future, Sterling is given the opportunity to help a needy young girl reunite with her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: When evil screams throughout the world. When all the galaxies converge. When all that's fair and fine seems lost. A Hero will emerge.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Barn Burner
programme.desc: After Beat and Sam build a beautiful home in Alberta, the clients egg them on to a paint ball battle on their acreage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust
programme.desc: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust captures the world’s best log home craftsmen like never before! This one-hour special takes you behind the scenes.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Bumper Farrell is on a mercy dash, leading a hay convoy into the eye of the storm.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A team of heavyweight champions drag a million dollar shed through the eye of a needle.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Murder Is Permanent
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a murder in a beauty salon; there are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Stolen Crime
programme.desc: A man demands to be arrested for murdering his wealthy wife whose death is attributed to natural causes. A valuable coin collection holds the answers.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert sets out to climb Evergreen Mountain alone to prove his independence. Meanwhile, Cyril Sneer plots to stop him to keep a hidden family secret safe. As Bert faces danger and doubt, he must rely on courage and determination to succeed.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Ralph take Cedric camping at their childhood fort, but to join their club, Cedric must spend the night in a haunted house alone. As fear sets in, Cedric discovers inner bravery while the others anxiously wait to see if he succeeds.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph receives a job offer in the city, and Ranger Dan is given a similar chance. Bert worries the group will split apart and be unable to stop Cyril’s plans, forcing everyone to decide whether to follow opportunity or stay together.

programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.

programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are assigned to investigate a wife-beating case and discover that the victim's husband is a cop and former classmate of Lacey's. Meanwhile the team also has to find a way to charge a con man after they are forced to let him go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Scenario for a Murder
programme.desc: Since October 10th 2008, no-one has seen friendly 38 year-old bachelor John Altinger. All that his friends know is that he was going to a garage in a residential area of Edmonton, to meet a woman he’d met on an online dating site.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods
programme.desc: On June 24th 1990, the day after a rock festival near Roseisle in Manitoba, 16 year-old Brigitte Grenier is found lying dead in a stream in the middle of the woods. The teenager’s body shows signs of violence and sexual mutilations.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: On August 4th, 2008, kayakers found a 40-year-old homeless man, Mark Hanley, floating near the marina in Nanaimo, British Columbia. He had been severely beaten and stabbed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A kind-hearted fifth grader befriends a strange girl in her neighborhood. Little does she know that her good intentions will have life-altering consequences.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Death Spiral
programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Polecat Flats/Hogules/Brain Boy
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield misadventures at a dude ranch./Orson imagines what Hogcules would do./Jon visits his cousin.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Maine Couse/First Aid Wade/Video Victim
programme.desc: The gang decide to keep a live lobster as a pet./Wade believes Orson and Roy are going to operate on his leg./Jon bets Garfield he can't go without TV for 24 hours.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Robodie/No Laughing Matter/The Attach of the Mutant Guppies
programme.desc: A mad scientist uses Odie as a model for a line of robot dogs./Aliens who have come to steal Earth's laughter./Garfield teases Nermal about giant mutant guppies.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Curse of Klopman/Mud Sweet Mud/Rainy Day Dreams
programme.desc: Garfield inherits the cursed diamond./The farm folk decide to clean up the place, Orson's waller becomes a prime objective./While Jon hosts a lady friend on a rainy day.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Basket Brawl/The Origin of Power Pig/Cactus Jake Rides Again
programme.desc: Jon, Odie & Nermal's attempt to go on a picnic./Orson tells how he became Power Pig./Cactus Jake moves in with Jon.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Binky Goes Bad/Barn of Fear/Screaming with Binky
programme.desc: A criminal disguises himself as Binky to commit crimes./Orson and crew must spend the night in the old barn./Binky visits an operating room.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Arrivaderci, Odie/Gort Goes Good/Feeling Feline
programme.desc: Garfield becomes guilt ridden when he believes he has caused Jon to get rid of Odie./One of Orson's older brothers decides to turn honest./Jon thinks he's acting too much like Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker
programme.desc: Garfield runs into a bear and Binky./The crew try to find one item that Wade will not be afraid of./Garfield makes a local talk show host regret his anti-cat comments.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cactus Makes Perfect/Hogules 2/Crime and Nourishment
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie visit Cactus Jake./When Roy and Wade have a fight, Orson wonders what Hogcules would do./Garfield discovers a secret world inside a tree.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV set when his old one breaks./Orson decides to make his own movie./Animal activist thinks Garfield is starving.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Bird Key
programme.desc: A successful business man is found brutally murdered in his palatial Southern Florida home. A mysterious backpack found at the crime scene is the key to the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Courage and Conviction
programme.desc: A college student's battle for survival may be the key to solving a double homicide from years earlier.

programme.title: On the Case: Message In Blood
programme.desc: When police arrive at the scene of a grisly murder they wonder if the victim's dying act would point them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: March 17, 1986 in Deerfield Beach, Florida 5- year-old Stacy Savage happily bounded up the street to the spot where her mother Angela Savage and her little brother met her after school. But when Stacy got there, her mother was nowhere to be found

programme.title: On the Case: A Harvest of Grief
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines the tragic case of a trail of blood and broken cornstalks leads police to the body of a young girl.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri
programme.desc: A 29-year-old hairdresser was found brutally stabbed on her doorstep in a quiet suburban street of London. A recording of a threatening phone call seemed to suggest the motive, but every lead comes to a dead end.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old Martha Moxley in Greenwich, Connecticut and the new developments in Kennedy family member Michael Skakel’s efforts to overturn his 2002 murder conviction of Moxley.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Follow the Money
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 26-year effort of Bruce Lisker to overturn his conviction for the murder of his mother. In March 1983, 17-year-old Bruce Lisker called 911 to tell police that he had found his mother, Dorka Lisker, beaten severely and stabbed in her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Married To The Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Despite only being trialled and convicted for the death of a single victim, Mary Ann Cotton is often classed as Britain's worst female serial killer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a murderer terrorised Edinburgh, killing young women in what became known as 'The World's End Murders'. 37 years later, Angus Sinclair would be convicted.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A murder investigation spans across multiple states after suitcases containing severed body parts wash ashore on Virginia Beach.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On the rural floodplain of northwestern Kentucky, spring rains wash human bones from a culvert near where a missing man, Rodney "Bo" Hale, was last seen three years ago.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A rural Utah town located in the Rocky Mountains experiences a nightmarish Christmas when a woman is found brutally stabbed to death; due to the wintry weather, detectives have their hands full as they search for her killer.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.

programme.title: The Case: Murder in the Vineyards
programme.desc: On December 6, 2012, Jean Aprin's lifeless body was found on his Roquebrussanne winery.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: The Case: The Angers Pedophile Network
programme.desc: In 2002, the biggest case of pedophilia in France breaks out in Angers.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: The Case: A Killer on the Loose
programme.desc: Susanna Zetterberg, a 19-year-old Swedish girl abducted as she left a Parisian nightclub,

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Serial rapes spur fear in a city in North Carolina. Years later new forensic science finds the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, the brutal murder of 15-year-old Melissa Lee shocked a Seattle suburb. The investigation proved fruitless. Thirty years later, the cold case was reopened. Will there be a breakthrough in the case?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman in Texas is killed and dumped in an old basement. The hosts attempt to determine whether new forensic tools are capable of finding the murderer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2024, Pamela Wittman, a 25-year-old from Indiana, was identified as a victim in the 1980 Daytona Beach cold case linked to a serial killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Found shot near Highway 67 in 1986, Maria Pilar Del Gordillo Carrillo remained unidentified until 2024, when authorities used genetic genealogy and reopened her case.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry persuades the vicar to let him run the local charity auction.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.desc: Lacey and Davis search for missing letters from the Ruby Cafe sign. Wanda demands more rights at Corner Gas.

programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen
programme.desc: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen out of a Chinatown auction, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of both a rare Bornean blowgun and special effects wire harnesses.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: An accidental death in upstate New York becomes a possible murder scene, and a wife and mother provides a crucial piece of evidence. Investigators confront the darkest side of humanity to discover an unspeakable truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: Wild Sex
programme.desc: Sex is at the heart of everything, driving touching courtships and fierce battles, it can change an animals purpose and persona. This is the story of how wild things get sexy.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Searchers
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Buddha's Delight
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Three's Company
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Strip Search
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in. It's a tough job but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secret Places
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: That's Our Dad
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love at Second Sight
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 1
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: For many people, the most credible UFO reports are those raised by law enforcement. We investigate the most significant reports from police records.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 11
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As the world continues to evolve into the digital age, people are capturing images in the sky that they are unable to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: While many UFO sightings occur in rural locations with only a single eyewitness, there have been sightings over cities witnessed by hundreds.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Dynasty: Krystle's Lie
programme.desc: After being fired for sabotaging Matthew's equipment, an innocent Steven learns he was set up; Lindsay is shattered to learn about her birth; Blake tries to learn who bankrolled Matthew; Fallon warns Steven's ex-lover to stay away from her brother.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Necklace

programme.title: Dynasty: The Beating

programme.title: Dynasty: The Separation

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Divorcee Shawny calls Nev and Max to help uncover the shadowy identity of her attempt at new love. But things get interesting as they discover that Shawny may have secrets of her own. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alante has been planning a life with his online love. She's perfect but her disappearances have Alante worried. Nev and Max help uncover a truth that affects Alante's entire town. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Danny is intent on building a life with his online love, despite her violent past. But when he enlists Nev and Max to help him meet her, they discover she may have ties to a former Catfish! (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After months of sexting with a hot model he met on a hookup app, Marvin is eager to meet him in person. Max and sidekick, singer Chantal Claret, agree to help Marvin find his crush. (S6, ep5)

programme.desc: In a visit to Texas, Farrah challenges Daniel about their relationship, Maci and Ryan argue about Ryan's new girlfriend and Amber looks for a new home for her and Leah. (S4, ep10)

programme.desc: Bentley's birthday leads to a blowout between Maci and Ryan, Farrah spends time with Sophia before saying goodbye for a month and Amber and Gary come up with a custody plan for Leah. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.desc: Crews help a family whose car has crashed into a ditch, a woman with fast and erratic breathing, and a partially paralysed woman who's suffered a head injury in her garden.

programme.desc: Paramedics have their hands full of a high-speed motorcycle crash, a woman with abdominal pain and an old lady who has fallen, injuring her face.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.desc: Paramedics from the South Central Ambulance Service treat a site foreman having a heart attack on a building site and a woman who has hit her head on sharp gardening shears.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET CULTS AND ORDERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at secret cults and mysterious orders including Skull and Bones at Yale University, the Freemasons, Thule and Vril Societies, the Bullingdon Club, the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is the amazing story of how a two amateur explorers discovered one of the world's greatest civilisations, the Maya.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can We Make it to Mars?
programme.desc: NOVA scienceNOW reports from the frontiers of science. This program examines Space Dangers; Space Suits; Space Food; Plasma Rockets; and a profile of space roboticist and JPL engineer Vandi Verma.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Richard can't refuse a bargain and his home is brimming with clearance items. Plus, Barbara reveals how her hoarding problem grew after losing her two sons.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A couple in Louisville, Kentucky who both suffer from hoarding risk losing their children if they don't comply with numerous citations, A woman's food hoarding in Milwaukee, Wisconsin is so bad that she places herself at risk for food poisoning.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Obsessive Michelle's 60 pet birds and five-foot piles of junk have chased her husband from the house. She must clean her house, clear her mind, and bring her husband home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, Carol has hoarded her husband's home. With the mansion threatened to be condemned, the family unites to try to save the house and confront Carol about her behaviour.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: An expert team attempts to give two hoarders a clean start, including Janet who sleeps on a chair in an unheated house full of rubbish and Phyllis, who has an extensive collection of dolls.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After telling too many wild stories, Bert is no longer believed when he discovers Cyril plans to pave the forest into a parking lot. With no one trusting him, Bert must find proof quickly before Cyril carries out his destructive plan.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril schemes to buy the Evergreen Standard by cutting off its supplies with help from Mr. Knox, who demands payment in gold. Bert tries to save the paper by finding a way to secure resources, leading to a risky plan to outsmart Cyril.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cousin Bentley visits the Raccoons, bringing his usual quirks along. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks to regain his youth using a questionable potion, leading to chaos as his reckless attempt causes unexpected and humorous consequences.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: With Sean as the captain, the biggest of the big-time bidders head to Marina Del Rey in search of true nautical treasures. In one of the most explosive episodes to date, Scott and Brandon test each others jibs.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Old rivals come out smokin’ in an attempt to uncover some unique finds. When Jesse tries to bump off Brandon and Lori, will he score high or strike out?

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: T Money puts his honesty to the test with shocking revelations. Jesse finds a loser bin that could make him a winner. Brandon and Lori think they see treasure in a unlikely place.

programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go for the gold – but find something even better. Jesse takes a swing at Team Brandori, while T- Money does some dangerous bidding of his own. Will Scott and Chrissy drive away with the golden prize?

programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Death Spiral
programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Good Vs Evil
programme.desc: When Jennifer Paulson rejects the advances of college classmate Jed, she unwittingly sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: A friendly nurse offers odd jobs to a struggling man who quickly becomes infatuated with her. Despite her rejections to his advances, the married man will not take "no" for an answer.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: An overachieving teen finds herself in danger after her violent ex-boyfriend becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession
programme.desc: When outgoing Cameron Wallace meets shy Ryan Clutter in a high school art class, they are only acquaintances. Little does she know that Ryan will stalk her for the next ten years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Toxic Love
programme.desc: Robin is a friendly waitress who catches the eye of a handsome customer. But after they begin a relationship, his twisted need for control bubbles to the surface.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When Harvette Williams gives her business card to Kevin Gary, she has no idea that she's inviting an obsessive stalker into her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Alberto Benitez is a successful police instructor in Kingsville, Texas. When he breaks up with his girlfriend, her obsession turns his life into a vicious game of survival.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero

programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: On the Case: Clearing the Docket

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton

programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: A domestic altercation outside Verdigre, Nebraska, ends fatally. Frances Thompson claims that she killed Dean Frank – wholly in self-defense. However, investigators are not so sure about these claims as they dig deeper.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: The small town of Enderby, British Columbia is shattered after well-loved residents, Derk Roelfsema and Audrey Foster-Roelfsema are found murdered in their own home.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: An intoxicated Kurt Johnson gets a ride home from a bar on New Year’s Eve 2010 in Cooperstown, ND. When it’s discovered that Kurt never got home, authorities start looking for him. Their investigations uncover shocking events.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation

programme.title: 48 Hours: The One Who Got Away
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Full Moon

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Choice
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: The condition of a mummified body that is found in the arid farmlands of Solano County, Calif., in 1996 leaves it unidentified for over 10 years, but when a cold case is reexamined, a startling connection is made.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: DJ Steven B. Williams mysteriously disappears off the coast of California, and once police begin their search, they soon learn this is no ordinary missing persons case, as a multi-million dollar inheritance has also vanished.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: A Haunting: Devil Inside Me
programme.desc: When John Drenner, Jr. finds a satanic bible, he unwittingly unleashes a sinister demon. The entity threatens John with violent physical attacks. Minister Bill Bean must act swiftly to perform a powerful exorcism and oust the demon before it’s too late.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Wrath
programme.desc: Unsettling nightmares of a dark angry figure plague Cindy as she prepares to move her family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a teen disappears, her family joins forces with the police to find her. But hopes of finding her alive quickly diminish when an alarming lead comes to light.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a spate of murders in a small Louisiana community, detectives struggle to extract a confession from the main suspect until they invoke the memory of his deceased mother.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect that a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.desc: Andrew and Janee Parsons’ marriage broke down when she fell for someone new. Still living in the family home, Janee hadn’t reckoned on Andrew’s jealousy and violence - just as he hadn’t realised his horrific actions would all be caught on tape.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn’t just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rhys Hancock was a respected school head; his wife Helen a much-loved PE teacher. When their marriage failed she found love with Martin Griffiths. But Rhys made the choice that ending his wife’s happiness would be worth the long prison sentence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Heather and Mark Arthur had been married 30 years. But their marriage wasn’t always a happy one: Mark was controlling and jealous, and eventually Heather decided she wanted out. When she confessed to finding new love, Mark’s jealousy boiled over.

programme.desc: With Major Hochstetter in the camp, Hogan has extra trouble trying to smuggle out a bomber crew especially after they are moved from their usual barracks.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Planting a fuel depot right outside Stalag 13,a German general is tempting Hogan. Marya the White Russian also shows up again.
