programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Midnight Run
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Hunt for Santa
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Call Waiting
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Kid Stuff
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Does It
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fishful Thinking
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: When Doves Fry
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Carpnado
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 2

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the travel challenges that alien spaceships face, and discover whether humans can tackle interstellar flight.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As humanity continues to search for alien life, experts give their analysis on how close we are to first contact.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Examine the possible components of aliens' protective second layer of skin.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Antigravity: Experts discuss the possibility of advanced alien technology that could allow UFOs to fly at blinding speed or hover effortlessly a few feet above the ground.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, there was an unprecedented wave of UFO sightings that propelled the UFO phenomenon to the world stage. What were the US Air Force's findings?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Millions of people believe extraterrestrial live on Earth. Are the aliens here to enlighten us or destroy us? What if the worst-case scenario happened? What would aliens do? And how would they do it?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They’re our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they’re often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world’s military forces have come face to face with thousands of unidentified objects.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Separation
programme.desc: Steven tells Claudia he spent the night with Ted; Krystle leaves Blake; seeing Ted embrace his son, Blake strikes him; Steven accuses his father of murder.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake Goes to Jail

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis' Secret

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Ouija Boards?
programme.desc: Harmless board game or portal to the spirit world? Richard delves into the history and folklore of 'talking boards' with a collector of Ouija boards and a world renowned paranormal investigator.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: According to legend, King Arthur was Britain’s greatest king. He led his Knights of the Round Table from Camelot, a spectacular castle, and fought Anglo-Saxon invaders, uniting the country. Leslie Alcock led a team to find Camelot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Wonders: What are Animals Saying?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders travels around the globe, where researchers are deciphering an amazing array of clues that reveal how animals share information critical to their survival.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can Science Stop Crime?
programme.desc: David Pogue gives the third degree to scientists pushing the limits of technology - not only to solve horrific murders, but to try to prevent crimes.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones explores the reign of Edward II.

programme.desc: The truth behind what really started the War of the Roses is told.

programme.desc: Dan Jones tells then story of Richard Neville, Earl of Warwick.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Did Richard III really kill the 'Princes in the Tower'?

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur's First Day
programme.desc: It's finally the first day of fourth grade and Arthur couldn't be more excited - until he learns Buster is in another class! Meanwhile, D.W. is nervous for her first day of kindergarten. Will Arthur and D.W. be able to make new friends?

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Voices of D-Day Landings
programme.desc: In the early hours of June 6th, 1944 Allied forces began the greatest military assault ever attempted. They came to Normandy by both air and sea with one objective.

programme.title: 1917 - The Real Story
programme.desc: Documentary of the True Story behind the International Blockbuster Film \\"1917\\" . Insight into the story behind the film. The real-life characters and what became of them.

programme.title: All Quiet On The Western Front - The True story
programme.desc: Discover the riveting true events of World War II that inspired the gripping Netflix TV series. Delve into the historical backdrop and real-life experiences that shaped the narrative, offering a fascinating glimpse into the origins of this acclaimed show.

programme.title: Battle of Britain - Empty Skies
programme.desc: Tells the story of 19 men and women who were there. Through a series of filmed interviews their stories have been preserved, allowing them to tell the part they played in the nation's defence in their own words creating a unique collection of accounts.

programme.title: Blitz the Aftermath
programme.desc: With interviews and archive footage showing the sheer amount of devastation – from the loss of life to the immense damage caused to buildings across the country - The Aftermath looks at how the Blitz changed the face of Britain's cities and lives.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Victory in war doesn't just require sound military strategy, vital resources and equipment are also critical. Discover how the Axis powers failed in this regard.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: This episode tells stories about the secret world of naval deception and cloak and dagger missions. 1914, the yacht Asgard, manned by Erskine Childers, smuggled rifles into a fishing village to arm an Irish militia in their struggle for Home Rule.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Hidden in Plain Sight 1935-1938
programme.desc: Hidden In Plain Sight 1935-1938: In 1934, Hitler's government is firmly in the saddle. Most Germans support Hitler's anti-Jewish policy and the regime's terror soon escalates.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Cambodian Civil War

programme.desc: 1942 and Hitler has the totally barking idea of using educated dogs to do a soldier's job. The Nazi leader wants to create fearsome canines to help him win the Second World War

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell embark on their penultimate leg. Christina had great success at the last auction. Can Philip catch her up as they kick off in Manchester and head to the auction in Melbourne, near York?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg on Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell's road trip. Phil won the last auction, but Christina is still in the lead. Who will win as they travel from Liverpool to their final showdown in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire?

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Hoping to move past the background check, Quad meets with Lisa Nicole, but things take an unexpected turn when Quad makes an accusation that sends Lisa Nicole reeling; Jackie kicks off her new fitness program, Fit Is the New It.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Jackie goes into drill-sergeant mode to stop Simone from eating junk food; some of the women go to a strip club, but the experience turns sour when Lisa Nicole finds out that the club is a habitual hangout for her husband.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Reeling from her visit to the strip club, Lisa Nicole confronts her husband; Toya tries to get involved in her husband's new business venture; Simone and Jackie demonstrate safe-sex techniques; Mariah and Quad try to mend their friendship.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Jackie comes up with creative strategy for the second phase of her fitness program; Lisa Nicole meets with her attorney to discuss legal options against Quad; Quad brings in high-powered attorney Phaedra Parks to weigh-in on the matter.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Quad jets off to California with Simone and Jill; Jackie struggles to tend to her ailing father both as a daughter and a doctor; Lisa throws a cooking party for her son's birthday, then drops a bomb that shocks Heavenly and Toya.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Quad refocuses her energy on marketing her doggy fashion line; Heavenly's husband insists she's spending too much time away from home; Simone withdraws Lisa Nicole's invitation to her party.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: After agreeing to a co-list in Bel Air, James and David struggle to get a word in edgewise during their showings; Flagg soaks in the waters of Palm Springs as he tries to sell Suzanne Somers' house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: When Fredrik tries to get brokers to his Upper Bel Air property, he faces a huge obstacle: LA traffic; James and David create a decoy to get a sale in Bel Air; Altman negotiates against his brother.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy trades her broker hat for a buyer hat when she starts searching for a home in Beverly Hills and is shocked when she realizes Flagg is listing her dream house; Fredrik pushes to set a record price in Upper Bel Air.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy goes head-to-head with Flagg on his listing in the Flats; in Beverly Hills, Altman falls in love with a midcentury masterpiece; James races to close a deal for Bernard "Harv" Harvey and his wife in the booming Valley market.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy's Abbot Kinney property is a tough sell, but not as tough as her confrontation with Fredrik; Altman wants to make up for misbehaving as a child by giving his parents something special; Flagg's expertise is tested with a very particular buyer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 801 crashes five km short of its destination. More than 200 people on board are killed. The crash is the beginning of a crusade for one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two 737 planes crash within several years of each other. The similarities are striking but investigators are stumped. It takes a third near miss, for investigators to get the break they need.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: February 19, 1985, a series of small mistakes causes a 747 passenger jet to fall 30,000 feet in just two minutes. Could a lack of sleep be behind the near disaster of China Airlines flight 006?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two planes collide in mid-air and crash into a Los Angeles suburb. There are more than 80 victims. The accident set in motion many changes, notably the way planes are monitored.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A military 737 carrying high-powered passengers crashes miles from its intended destination in Croatia. Was the accident an act of terrorism against the United States or were other factors to blame?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple are all at sea as they attempt to run a new fishing charter. How will two bed & breakfasters in France cope with their biggest challenge yet? And on the Costa Blanca, a family pulls together to try and rescue their Spanish dream but will it work?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Owners of a vineyard open a pop up restaurant in a stunning location, but there are some last minute nerves. Two bed & breakfasters host an unusual event in a bid to boost takings. And in Spain, a wannabe fishing captain has to learn the ropes.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: It’s decision time for a couple hoping to run a fishing charter business. How will two bed & breakfasters cope with some tricky customers? And with their first ever guests now booked in, will an observatory business in rural France please it’s punters?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two estate agents attempt to turn their passion for wine into profit by running a vineyard in France. Can a young couple open their guest house in time? And we follow the launch of a new paragliding business off the mountains of Costa Blanca.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple need to diversity their French gite business, there’s a rocky start for a paragliding company in Spain, and can two novice wine makers take on the French at a local wine fair?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple branch out, offering package holidays at their beautiful French gite, two novice winemakers finally move house, and will a new fishing business impress its latest guests?

programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When Patricia Steller and her nephew Ronald King are found shot, stabbed and murdered in their quaint home in Middleton, Connecticut, police struggle to piece together the remnants of the crime scene to catch the brutal killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Padre Pio, Pts. 1 & 2, Model's Third Notebook & UD, Calculating Coroners & UD and Nazi's Lazarus.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 104
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person with no flight training land a jet while being assisted by the traffic controllers over the radio? Is it possible to talk while falling at terminal velocity?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 87
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a human voice extinguish a flame? Can hypnotists plant suggestions in unwilling patients? Can hypnosis help bring back dormant memories?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 45
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do steel toe boots really put toes in more danger than a regular boot, to the extent that the steel toe would chop off the toes? Can bottle rockets be used to launch a human?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 151
programme.desc: Are some types of people more tolerant to pain? Can a BBQ propane tank heat up enough in a fire to launch through a garage roof like a rocket?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 186
programme.desc: Can a pallet of duct tape help you survive on a deserted island?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Total creep out!"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team is back this time with a rather unusual haunted venue, providing a very uneasy atmosphere. With reports of phantom footsteps, unexplained voices, and a full apparition. But what will the team uncover for themselves?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "A very strange place"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team investigates a venue with some amazing history and some bizarre incidents. Everything from unexplained footsteps to apparitions has been witnessed here; and for two members of the crew, it will be a venue they won't forget.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A woman receives terrifying phone messages from an unknown caller who seems to be watching her every move. A baby goes missing after a couple brings an antique rocking chair into their home.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A mysterious car pulls into a woman's driveway every night at the same time. A newly divorced man is terrorized after moving into an abandoned house on his uncle's farm.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A family is terrorized after bringing an antique camera into their home. Four college graduates plan to spend their summer in a remote cabin in the mountains.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job have caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Chris and Steve confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress. The tension is high on today's Jerry Springer Show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Three Sisters Share A Man!
programme.desc: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the nine positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about two of his nine children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
programme.desc: There’s no worse time to be fighting with your family than during the holidays. Our old friends Donna and her cheating husband Richard join us for a holiday feast!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: The Scarlet Claw
programme.desc: When a gentlewoman is found dead with her throat torn out, the villagers blame a supernatural monster. But Sherlock Holmes, who gets drawn into the case from nearby Quebec, suspects a human murderer.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An advice columnist turns to Holmes when a man badly beats him and threatens a young woman's life.

programme.title: The Pearl of Death
programme.desc: When a valuable pearl with a sinister reputation is stolen, Sherlock Holmes must investigate its link to a series of brutal murders.

programme.title: Pursuit to Algiers
programme.desc: Holmes is recruited to escort the heir to a European throne safely back to his homeland after his father's assassination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that the 16 contestants must successfully complete the opening dinner service, but he may be forced to eat his words.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team with the most properly cooked eggs wins a helicopter tour of Los Angeles; when a chef gets into an argument with Ramsay, it threatens a team.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cheerleaders and members of the marching band from the University of Southern California have their lunch prepared by the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The next challenge has an element of the unknown to it, as the contestants must create dishes using ingredients chosen by the roll of a die.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must use the ingredients which can be found written on a selection of pigs' collars. First though, they must catch the pigs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Five classic sauces: hollandaise, béchamel, demi-glacé, velouté and tomato, must be the basis of the contestants' dishes in this challenge.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Whassup With Heyyy?
programme.desc: After T launches a successful business using one of Kim and Nikki’s favorite sayings, all three of them wind up in court.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scary Kim
programme.desc: The Grim Reaper turns Kim’s birthday bash into the ultimate fright fest.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim square off in a campus election.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Kim puts her own spin on the legendary television show, 'Dallas,' by imagining her family and friends as the twisted characters from the primetime series of lust and greed.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: TURKEY DAY BLUES
programme.desc: After a minor spat with Nikki gets blown way out of proportion, Kim spendsThanksgiving alone.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Cheers
programme.desc: Nikki tries out for cheerleading and Professor Oglevee tries too hard to be hip.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: New Stories
programme.desc: Andi's relationship with Gary takes a definitive turn. New information helps shed light on Sabrina's problem and her fears. Danni extends an olive branch to Zac. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: One Day At A Time
programme.desc: Andi discovers getting what she wants isn't all it's cracked up to be. Karen resolves not to make the same mistake as Andi. Sabrina's next venture with Calvin deepens her fears. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: No Judgement
programme.desc: Andi struggles to keep her personal life and job separate. Developments in Karen's love life poses new possibilities. Sabrina provides the voice of wisdom to her friends. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of this terrifying place concentrates above ground. The team are alarmed at the results from a new piece of equipment and Yvette meets her match.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Home Possession
programme.desc: Learn how three families are dealing with properties overrun by ghosts.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dream Home Nightmares
programme.desc: Visit a haunted inn and a dream home that turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Ghost Attacks
programme.desc: Spirits harass the new owner of a farm, and a demon torments a man for years.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing In Evil
programme.desc: Meet a couple who invite spirits into their home through their nursery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: An Invitation to Evil (Letting Them In)
programme.desc: An antique buyer brings evil home, and a demonic spirit makes a house call.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spellbound
programme.desc: Sandra learns her house is haunted. She tries to perform Wiccan ceremonies but opens a portal.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect that a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators expose the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father in a headline-making case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Askham
programme.desc: Ann and Tony Askham hope their collectables will fund a new porch and access ramp.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Ruskin

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Stevens

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Sturdy

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: A compilation of highlights featuring Chris Pratt, Emily Blunt, Ryan Reynolds, Sandra Bullock, David Beckham, Bryce Dallas Howard, Usain Bolt, Emilia Clarke, Channing Tatum, Kylie Minogue, Dwayne Johnson, Gloria Estefan, Jeff Goldblum, and more.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Oscar-winning actor Nicole Kidman, actor and writer Stephen Fry, stand-up comedian Joe Lycett, and cycling champion Geraint Thomas. Also featuring a performance from pop superstars Take That.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: August Gissler’s amazing seventeen year quest to find the buried pirate treasure on Cocos Island

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Afterlife Investigations
programme.desc: Narrated by Britain's leading investigative Journalist - Donal MacIntyre - this award winning film presents four never before seen scientific investigations into life after death.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Brides In The Bath Killer
programme.desc: George Smith had many aliases. He needed them for his many wives who he would soon murder in order to claim the inheritance. Catching this chameleon would be a gargantuan challenge.

programme.title: Murder Maps: Terror In The Roaring Twenties
programme.desc: Edith Thompson and Frederick Bywaters were in love. But the young couple were convicted for murdering her husband in a case that shocked society and fascinated Alfred Hitchcoc

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper
programme.desc: It was WWII and London was rocked by the Blitz from the planes flying above. But down on the streets below another terrible danger lurked in the shadows. A serial killer was on the loose.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Wonders: What's Living in You?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders discovers a whole new paradigm for understanding how the human body works and opens up a new world of microbial forensics.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: scienceNOW: How Smart Can We Get?
programme.desc: How Smart Can We Get? How do you get a genius brain? Is it all in the genes? Or is it hard work? Episodes include: Einstein's Brain; Mystery of the Savant Brain; What is Intelligence?; and Profile: Sian Beilock.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Blitz the Aftermath
programme.desc: With interviews and archive footage showing the sheer amount of devastation – from the loss of life to the immense damage caused to buildings across the country - The Aftermath looks at how the Blitz changed the face of Britain's cities and lives.

programme.title: The Blitz
programme.desc: The Blitz looks at the build-up to the raids and detailed footage of the destruction that followed. It features interviews from those who lived through it and stories of sadness and bravery, at a time when Britain held strong and swore not to surrender.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt
programme.desc: Tells the stories of those who experienced the end of the war in all its many forms. It features a wide range of interviews from children who remember the street parties, to the servicemen who remember not having to buy a single drink that day.

programme.title: Anzacs: In The Face Of War

programme.desc: The couples depart for the Bahamas, where they are met by a festive band at the hotel; by dinner, Jill and Dr. Heavenly are going head-to-head for round two of their disagreement.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Unresolved issues arise between Mariah and the others; Dr. Heavenly decides not to attend Quad's "Heroes in Healthcare" event; Mariah reveals the real reason why she holds a grudge against Toya, causing the group to question whether she belongs.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: When the husbands join the discussion, it is revealed that Darren isn't the only one who enjoys strippers; Mariah lands in the hot seat; the conversation turns to Toya's and Eugene's inability to communicate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy's Abbot Kinney property is a tough sell, but not as tough as her confrontation with Fredrik; Altman wants to make up for misbehaving as a child by giving his parents something special; Flagg's expertise is tested with a very particular buyer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fredrik and Altman return to their Beverly Park co-list with an offer, but the seller tests the bonds of their relationship; Flagg hosts an exclusive dinner party while trying to close a deal in the Beverly Hills Flats.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Even though Flagg has not found a buyer yet, Suzanne Somers' house might just sell; Tracy and her daughters check on the progress of their new house; Fredrik and Altman each snag ocean-front properties as they both want to expand into the new market.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy's delighted to list the house of Gleb Savchenko and Elena Samodanova from "Dancing with the Stars" but it needs a facelift; the Brits get their hands dirty when hosting a dinner party at their 30-million-dollar Nightingale property.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy tries to dance her way to a deal on the Skyline property; Altman aims to break Brentwood records with a property that has more bells and whistles than anyone could dream of.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A military 737 carrying high-powered passengers crashes miles from its intended destination in Croatia. Was the accident an act of terrorism against the United States or were other factors to blame?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane crashes into the Red Sea minutes after take off. Was it terrorism? A mechanical failure? Or did the very experienced and respected pilot make a mistake that cost all on board their lives?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane mysteriously circles the Athens airport. It doesn’t answer air traffic controllers. The captain and co-pilot are missing but someone else is in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The crew of Delta Airlines Flight 191 see rain and lightning up ahead, but fly on. Inside the storm, their plane is hit by powerful winds that slam the plane to the ground. 136 people die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An inexplicable failure strikes – the loss of two engines on a brand new passenger jet. Powerless at 30,000 ft, the pilot needs all his skill, and a little bit of luck, to get his plane to the airport

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple branch out, offering package holidays at their beautiful French gite, two novice winemakers finally move house, and will a new fishing business impress its latest guests?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The last-minute dash to open a tapas bar with a difference in Spain, and a celebrity guest checks in to a French fishing holiday lodge. A couple opening a bed & breakfast for runners, and the new winemakers in France begin work on their new gites.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: As the summer comes to an end, its harvest day for the new winemakers in France. A disease threatens the future of a fishing business, and will a revamp save Spain’s newest tapas bar?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A family opens a cycling tour company in Southern France. An English diving instructor in Marbella buys out his only competitor, and after a lifetime spent locking up criminals, two former policemen buy a bed & breakfast in Southern Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A mix up at the pumps leaves a diving instructor stranded in Marbella, and two London policemen crash their van on the way to Spain. With eight days to spare a family races to finish renovations on their bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There are building problems at an English-run bed & breakfast. A diving instructor in Marbella faces an uncertain future, and after being refused a mortgage in London, a young couple tries their luck in southern Spain.

programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A comical dilemma involving Tony accidentally gathering together a herd of unwieldy creatures is solved by Edyn casting a spell. Tony and Strag wonder if they've been relying on Edyn's spells too much to solve their problems, but Edyn isn’t worried.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Grim Tale
programme.desc: When a Ph.D. in DNA challenges Gore to a duel, the prognosis is positively grim!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are excited about a fishing contest. Barney tells Riff about a famous musician named Beethoven who wrote beautiful music even when he couldn't hear.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.
