programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With Majin Buu defeated, Goku has taken a completely unexpected new role as a farmer! Now, with Earth at peace, our heroes have settled into normal lives.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Having murdered Bulma and Mai in the alternate future timeline, Goku Black mocks Trunks, who must find a way to escape to the past and warn the Z Fighters.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After mistakenly attacking Goku, Trunks reintroduces himself and explains the threat to his timeline; Goku and Trunks spar to get a sense of each other's power levels.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Goku Black fight each other, but the time portal begins to collapse, dragging Goku Black into it. Also, with Trunks' capsule destroyed, the group must find a new means of time travel.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku heads off to train while Bulma fixes up Cell's old time-travelling capsule. Also, Trunks explains what happened in his future and the emergence of Goku Black.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The gang continues making repairs; at Piccolo and Krillin's suggestion, Future Trunks goes to visit Gohan, who mentored him in his timeline.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku, Whis and Beerus track Goku Black's energy signature to Universe 10, where they meet an apprentice Kai named Zamasu whom Goku challenges to a fight.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The time capsule repairs near completion, Vegeta becomes angry upon measuring Future Trunks' strength, and Zeno makes a surprising request to Beerus.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Mia is faced with both personal and tournament challenges as she takes on Angus and Hail in the championship Brawl.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: V's partner is revealed, and they face off against Mia and Ventri in a high-stakes brawl.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Griffin and Juno visit V's MOD to figure out how he's able to convince Bakugan to join his side.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Alice becomes Masked Man to aid Dan and Drago, but they find Centorrior and Druman unexpectedly powerful. Undeterred, Dan and Masked Man formulate a strategy to overcome their foes.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Professor Elm's Pokémon Egg hatches into a Larvitar! The Pokémon is unresponsive even after being checked over at the Pokémon Center, and Ash tries to cheer it up, but soon Team Rocket arrives to ruin all his hard work.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: On their way to Mt. Silver, our heroes relax at a hot spring and meet a young Trainer who's tracking the Legendary Pokémon Entei. Trouble arises when Team Rocket follows them with a plan to steal Pikachu and Larvitar!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes find a group of SlowPoké guarding a dried-up stream and hear the tale of a similar drought long ago, when one SlowPoké took the initiative to evolve into Slowking and save everyone. Can the same thing happen here?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A cheeky Elekid starts to bother Larvitar, but soon both Pokémon are in the clutches of Team Rocket. Ash's rival Casey wants to catch Elekid for herself, but can they mount a rescue before the villains get away?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes have reached Mt. Silver, and Ash wastes no time starting his training for the Johto League Silver Conference. But all the Trainers around provide the perfect prey for Team Rocket, who arrive to swipe all the rare Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a frightened Unown transports our heroes to another dimension, they make some exciting discoveries about Larvitar!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: There's no warm reception for our heroes when they finally reach Larvitar's home on Mt. Silver—they find themselves being attacked by the Tyranitar living there!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes are called into action to save the Johto League Silver Conference's opening ceremony from being stopped by a territorial Sneasel!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Johto League Silver Conference has begun, and Ash and his rivals are getting serious about what the future has in store!
